message:
chore: suppress dead_code warnings in GUI crates, fix screen_line rendering, add dhat profiler support, refactor bench config

Dead-code suppressions across frankenterm-gui modules:
- dashboard.rs: module-level #![allow(dead_code)] — dashboard widgets not yet
  wired into all code paths
- frontend.rs: gui_window_for_mux_window() — retained for future workspace
  switching but currently unused
- inputmap.rs: default_input_map() — kept as fallback constructor
- native_bridge.rs: BridgeEvent enum — protocol events defined ahead of wire
  integration
- scripting/mod.rs: register() — Lua scripting registration awaiting GUI hookup
- stats.rs: register() — Lua metrics registration awaiting GUI hookup
- webgpu.rs: shader_uniform_bind_group_layout field — retained for pipeline
  recreation but not read after initial setup

Rendering fix (screen_line.rs):
- Remove redundant `phys_cell_idx` increment that was tracking physical cell
  position independently of `visual_cell_idx` — the physical index was computed
  but never consumed, and its presence caused confusion during glyph positioning
  analysis

Feature gate removal (proptest_search.rs):
- Remove `#![feature(stmt_expr_attributes)]` — this nightly-only feature gate
  is no longer needed after prior test refactoring removed inline attributes
  on statements, allowing the test to compile on stable Rust

Heap profiler support (dhat):
- Add `dhat = "0.3"` to workspace dependencies
- Add optional `dhat` dep to frankenterm-gui with `dhat-heap` and `dhat-ad-hoc`
  feature flags — enables `cargo run --features dhat-heap` for allocation profiling
  without affecting default builds
- Cargo.lock updated with dhat 0.3.3, mintex 0.1.4, thousands 0.2.0

Benchmark refactor (input_latency_bench.rs):
- Extract `bench_config()` helper that calls `emit_bench_artifacts()` before
  returning the configured Criterion instance
- Switch criterion_group! to named config syntax for cleaner artifact emission
  on every benchmark run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 ]

+ "backtrace",
+ "lazy_static",
+ "mintex",
+ "parking_lot",
+ "rustc-hash 1.1.0",
+ "serde",

+ "thousands",
+]

 [[package]]
 name = "diff"
 version = "0.1.13"

  "codec",

  "config",

  "emojis",

 ]

 [[package]]

@@ -9808,6 +9831,12 @@ dependencies = [
  "syn 2.0.117",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "thousands"
+version = "0.2.0"

 [[package]]

 version = "1.1.9"

@@ -237,6 +237,7 @@ thiserror = "2.0.18"
 anyhow = "1.0.100"
 tracing = "0.1.44"
 tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3.22", features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+dhat = "0.3"
 
 # CLI
 clap = { version = "4.5.54", features = ["derive", "env"] }

@@ -17,6 +17,8 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 [features]
 default = []
 wayland = ["window/wayland"]
+dhat-heap = ["dep:dhat"]
+dhat-ad-hoc = ["dep:dhat"]
 
 [build-dependencies]
 anyhow.workspace = true
@@ -85,6 +87,7 @@ lazy_static.workspace = true
 libc.workspace = true
 log.workspace = true
 metrics.workspace = true
+dhat = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 mlua = { workspace = true, features = ["send", "serialize"] }
 nucleo-matcher.workspace = true
 ordered-float.workspace = true

@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ pub struct WebGpuState {
     pub render_pipeline: wgpu::RenderPipeline,
     shader_uniform_buffer: wgpu::Buffer,
     shader_uniform_bind_group: wgpu::BindGroup,
+    #[allow(dead_code)]
     shader_uniform_bind_group_layout: wgpu::BindGroupLayout,
     pub texture_bind_group_layout: wgpu::BindGroupLayout,
     pub texture_nearest_sampler: wgpu::Sampler,
